units.title: Remediate src/services (4 findings)

findings.title: silent failure: subscribeToClass onSnapshot error callback logs and does not propagate
findings.detail: Real: on a permission or network error the class listener stops updating and only console.errors; the code comment acknowledges the UI will stay on Loading or a stale state, with no signal to the user.

extra.swallowKind: subscribeToClass onSnapshot error callback logs and does not propagate
extra.realVsBenign: Real: on a permission or network error the class listener stops updating and only console.errors; the code comment acknowledges the UI will stay on Loading or a stale state, with no signal to the user.

evidence: subscribeToClass onSnapshot error callback logs and does not propagate

Real: on a permission or network error the class listener stops updating and only console.errors; the code comment acknowledges the UI will stay on Loading or a stale state, with no signal to the user.

findings.title: deleteClass cascade is non-atomic
findings.detail: deleteClass deletes the class's stations via Promise.all and then deletes the class doc, with no transaction. If a station delete or the final class delete fails midway, the data is left in a partial state (some stations gone, the class or other stations remaining) with no rollback.

extra.consequence: deleteClass deletes the class's stations via Promise.all and then deletes the class doc, with no transaction. If a station delete or the final class delete fails midway, the data is left in a partial state (some stations gone, the class or other stations remaining) with no rollback.

evidence: deleteClass deletes the class's stations via Promise.all and then deletes the class doc, with no transaction. If a station delete or the final class delete fails midway, the data is left in a partial state (some stations gone, the class or other stations remaining) with no rollback.

findings.title: silent failure: subscribeToStations onSnapshot error callback only console.errors
findings.detail: Real: the stations list silently stops updating in real time on a subscription error, with no UI feedback.

extra.swallowKind: subscribeToStations onSnapshot error callback only console.errors
extra.realVsBenign: Real: the stations list silently stops updating in real time on a subscription error, with no UI feedback.

evidence: subscribeToStations onSnapshot error callback only console.errors
Real: the stations list silently stops updating in real time on a subscription error, with no UI feedback.

findings.title: silent failure: subscribeToStation onSnapshot error callback only console.errors
findings.detail: Real: a single station's live view silently stops updating on a subscription error, with no UI feedback.

extra.swallowKind: subscribeToStation onSnapshot error callback only console.errors
extra.realVsBenign: Real: a single station's live view silently stops updating on a subscription error, with no UI feedback.

evidence: subscribeToStation onSnapshot error callback only console.errors

units.summary: Firestore data layer: class CRUD plus a real-time subscribeToClass (onSnapshot) and a non-atomic deleteClass cascade.

units.title: Remediate src/components (3 findings)

findings.title: footgun: handleSubmit sets saving=true and resets it in the catch, reading as a normal save-with-spinner
findings.detail: The success path never calls setSaving(false); it silently relies on the parent onSave to unmount the dialog. If the parent keeps the form mounted, the Save button stays disabled showing 'Saving...' forever.

extra.appearance: handleSubmit sets saving=true and resets it in the catch, reading as a normal save-with-spinner
extra.reality: The success path never calls setSaving(false); it silently relies on the parent onSave to unmount the dialog. If the parent keeps the form mounted, the Save button stays disabled showing 'Saving...' forever.

evidence: handleSubmit sets saving=true and resets it in the catch, reading as a normal save-with-spinner

The success path never calls setSaving(false); it silently relies on the parent onSave to unmount the dialog. If the parent keeps the form mounted, the Save button stays disabled showing 'Saving...' forever.

findings.title: Copy shows a success toast even when the clipboard write fails
findings.detail: handleCopy calls navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) without awaiting it, then unconditionally opens the success toast. If the write rejects (permissions, insecure context), the user sees success while nothing was copied.

extra.consequence: handleCopy calls navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) without awaiting it, then unconditionally opens the success toast. If the write rejects (permissions, insecure context), the user sees success while nothing was copied.

evidence: handleCopy calls navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) without awaiting it, then unconditionally opens the success toast. If the write rejects (permissions, insecure context), the user sees success while nothing was copied.

findings.title: silent failure: delete button calls stationService.deleteStation(row.id) fire-and-forget
findings.detail: Real: the delete promise is neither awaited nor caught, so a failed deletion rejects unhandled with no user feedback; the row appears actionable but a failure is invisible.

extra.realVsBenign: Real: the delete promise is neither awaited nor caught, so a failed deletion rejects unhandled with no user feedback; the row appears actionable but a failure is invisible.

evidence: Real: the delete promise is neither awaited nor caught, so a failed deletion rejects unhandled with no user feedback; the row appears actionable but a failure is invisible.

units.summary: 23 React components (admin, station, course management): forms, data tables, lesson hierarchies, and station management UI.

units.title: Remediate src/pages (1 finding)

findings.title: silent failure: loadClasses catch logs the error but sets no error state
findings.detail: Real: a failed getClasses/getCourses load is caught, console.errored, and loading is cleared, so the dashboard shows an empty DataGrid with no way to tell a load failure from genuinely empty data.

extra.swallowKind: loadClasses catch logs the error but sets no error state
extra.realVsBenign: Real: a failed getClasses/getCourses load is caught, console.errored, and loading is cleared, so the dashboard shows an empty DataGrid with no way to tell a load failure from genuinely empty data.

evidence: loadClasses catch logs the error but sets no error state
Real: a failed getClasses/getCourses load is caught, console.errored, and loading is cleared, so the dashboard shows an empty DataGrid with no way to tell a load failure from genuinely empty data.

units.summary: 5 page components: login, admin dashboard / class management, and student station views, loading real-time data from Firestore.

units.title: Remediate src/utils (1 finding)

findings.title: footgun: getNextValidIndex ends with Math.min(nextIndex, flatList.length - 1), reading as a safe clamp that prevents overflow
findings.detail: On an empty course flatList.length - 1 is -1, so it returns -1, an invalid index. A caller indexing flatList[-1] gets undefined (JS arrays do not wrap), so an empty course silently yields a bad lesson index rather than a guarded result.

extra.appearance: getNextValidIndex ends with Math.min(nextIndex, flatList.length - 1), reading as a safe clamp that prevents overflow
extra.reality: On an empty course flatList.length - 1 is -1, so it returns -1, an invalid index. A caller indexing flatList[-1] gets undefined (JS arrays do not wrap), so an empty course silently yields a bad lesson index rather than a guarded result.

evidence: getNextValidIndex ends with Math.min(nextIndex, flatList.length - 1), reading as a safe clamp that prevents overflow

On an empty course flatList.length - 1 is -1, so it returns -1, an invalid index. A caller indexing flatList[-1] gets undefined (JS arrays do not wrap), so an empty course silently yields a bad lesson index rather than a guarded result.

units.summary: Course utilities: flatten the lesson tree to a DFS array and compute the next unlocked lesson index.
